name: prd-workflow-codex
description: A stateful, Korean-first Codex PRD workflow covering build risk, planning, Replan review, PRD generation, validation, and optional /goal handoff.

interface.shortDescription: Replan, write, review, and hand off a PRD
interface.longDescription: Routes PRD requests through build-risk review, problem and hypothesis framing, a short gap interview, a five-file PRD bundle, adversarial critique, edge cases, acceptance criteria, measurement design, a Replan approval gate, and an optional /goal execution handoff while maintaining a shared decision log and master checklist.
defaultPrompt: PRD 만들자. 시작 전 위험 검토부터 문제·가설, 본 PRD, 비판 검수, 예외·완료 조건, 측정 설계까지 전체 흐름으로 진행해줘.
이 기존 기획을 보존하면서 부족한 부분만 보강해줘.
PRD를 검토한 뒤 실행 계획과 /goal 핸드오프까지 준비해줘.
